other_observers: Larry Semo and Rachel Hopper I think saw this bird, Thomas Riecke saw the bird; Seth Gallagher of RMBO spotted and Id'd the bird
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch, Holmes Grove Bird Banding Station
description: A large slow-moving Dendroica Warbler  The bird was high overhead in a cottonwood tree. so my view was mostly ventral. The lower breast and belly were creamy white. The tail was dark with some tailspots visible briefly. The throat was very dark brown and the breast and sides were rich chestnut brown. The head was dark brown-black and there was a creamy ear patch on the side of the headBehaviors: Feeding slowly in a cottonwoodCall: none notedPlumage: Breeding male
